hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT rownum AS "contador", FH.NRO_REGISTRO AS "nroRegistro", FH.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "idReglaNegocio", FH.ID_FUENTE_HISTORIA AS "idFuenteHistoria", FH.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA AS "idFuenteAlerta", FH.ANIO AS "anio", FH.CLAVE_ENTERA AS "claveEntera", FH.CLAVE_CADENA AS "claveCadena", FH.ESTADO AS "estado", FH.CREACION_FECHA AS "creacionFecha" FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_HISTORIA FH with (nolock) WHERE FH.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = NVL(:p_codigo, FH.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND TRUNC(FH.CREACION_FECHA) BETWEEN TO_DATE(:fecha1, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(:fecha2, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND (NVL(:p_claveentera, 0) = 0 OR FH.CLAVE_ENTERA = :p_claveentera) AND (NVL(:p_clavecadena, '-') = '-' OR FH.CLAVE_CADENA = :p_clavecadena) ORDER BY FH.ID_FUENTE_HISTORIA DESC

SELECT count(*) FROM SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_HISTORIA FH with (nolock) WHERE FH.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = NVL(:p_codigo, FH.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND TRUNC(FH.CREACION_FECHA) BETWEEN TO_DATE(:fecha1, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND TO_DATE(:fecha2, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AND (NVL(:p_claveentera, 0) = 0 OR FH.CLAVE_ENTERA = :p_claveentera) AND (NVL(:p_clavecadena, '-') = '-' OR FH.CLAVE_CADENA = :p_clavecadena) ORDER BY FH.ID_FUENTE_HISTORIA DESC
UPDATE SGALERTASSYS.FUENTE_HISTORIA FH SET FH.ESTADO = :p_estado WHERE fh.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = :p_reglanegocio AND fh.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA = :p_fuentealerta AND fh.NRO_REGISTRO = :p_nroregistro
